P a g e  3 / 9  
 
Step 2: Annotation Standardization 
All source annotations (originally in COCO JSON or XML formats) were 
programmatically converted to the YOLO PyTorch format: 
• Format: < class_id >< x_center >< y_center >< width >< height > 
(normalized to 0-1). 
• Verification: A validation check was run to ensure no bounding boxes 
exceeded image boundaries during conversion. 
 
Step 3: Image Standardization 
To maintain consistency during the stochastic gradient descent process:

• Resolution: All images are resized to 𝟔𝟒𝟎 × 𝟔𝟒𝟎 pixels. 
• Normalization: Pixel values are scaled to the [0,1] range. 
 
2.4. Preliminary Experiments: HomeObject-3k Baseline 
Before finalizing the unified dataset, we conducted a baseline study using only the 
HomeObject-3k dataset to measure initial performance. 
• Observation: The model achieved high precision for "Chair" and "Sofa" but 
failed entirely on "Refrigerator" and "Door" due to their absence in the original 
source.

source. 
• Conclusion: This experiment justified the need for the DSAI-Unified-
Dataset to provide the linguistic and visual variety required for Milestone 3. 
Dataset HomeObject-3k HomeObject-3k HomeObject-3k
